author: phase-4-coordinator
content: Meta issue from when the oracle suite was first added. Current state: oracle tests pass cleanly across all 8 instrumented crates with no known bugs. Specific bugs surfaced by the oracle suite have been tracked in dedicated issues over time (e.g., the Windows signgam fix in #41, exp_fast SIMD dispatch in #42, etc.). Closing this catch-all in favor of crate-specific issues.
